Describe your project in plain text → AI writes a complete, professional proposal, contract or invoice in under 60 seconds. Ready to send. ✓ 40+ languages ✓ E-signature built in ✓ Stripe payment links in invoices ✓ Proposals, contracts, invoices, quotes, scope of work ✓ Custom branding ✓ Free plan available Built for designers, developers, consultants, photographers, tradespeople — anyone who bills for their time.

posts.name: LinkedIn Game Solver
posts.tagline: Daily solutions for LinkedIn's online games!
posts.description: I've created a website that uses my open-source Python package that automatically solves LinkedIn games by extracting solutions from network requests. It displays it on the site and displays all the solutions. It's been running for over a year, so feel free to take a look. Solves all LinkedIn daily games: - Pinpoint - CrossClimb - Queens - Zip - Tango - Mini Sudoku Headless operation (no browser window required), saves solutions to JSON files, simple API for integration into other projects.

posts.name: Numerati
posts.tagline: A daily puzzle game where today's date is the answer
posts.description: Every day, the 8 digits of today's date (MM/DD/YYYY) are scrambled across a tile board. Your job: restore them to the correct order. Tiles don't just swap. A tile can blast its neighbor across the board, traveling a distance equal to its own value. Finding the optimal solution in the fewest moves possible is the challenge. One puzzle per day. Everyone plays the same one. Your days are numbered.

posts.name: Arionis
posts.tagline: LATAM's largest AI Data Licensing Infrastructure
posts.description: Latin America generates massive amounts of untapped real-world data — and AI labs need exactly that to train better models. Arionis builds the licensing infrastructure to unlock it. We connect LATAM content holders (broadcasters, creators, businesses) with AI companies, managing the full pipeline: acquisition, compliance, and revenue distribution. Content providers retain ownership. Labs get exclusive, GDPR-compliant training data.

posts.name: SpeakUp: Public Speaking Coach
posts.tagline: Practice speaking. Get instant AI feedback.
posts.description: SpeakUp is an AI speaking coach for anyone who talks too fast, says "um" too much, or just hates the sound of their own voice. Record yourself on any topic, get instant feedback on pace, filler words, clarity, and delivery, see a 10/10 rewritten version of your speech side by side, and track your progress with a full highlighted transcript.

posts.name: Biddie
posts.tagline: Local auctions with neighbors you trust
posts.description: Biddie is a neighborhood-based auction app that makes local buying and selling simple, fun, and trustworthy. Join or create a neighborhood, list items in seconds, and bid on local auctions nearby. Every auction starts at $1 and runs for 24 hours, helping sellers clear things out fast while buyers discover great local deals. No shipping, no random marketplace chaos, just neighbors buying and selling with neighbors.

posts.name: VMCO
posts.tagline: Exchange your LLM tokens. Use every model.
posts.description: VMCO is a peer-to-peer LLM token exchange. Contribute API keys for one model — earn credits when others use them. Spend credits on any model from any provider. Your GPT-4o tokens become Claude, Gemini, or DeepSeek tokens. Unlike gateways (OpenRouter, LiteLLM, Portkey) that just route requests, VMCO is a true two-sided marketplace — anyone can be a provider and earn passive income from idle API subscriptions.

posts.name: FabLog
posts.tagline: Track the real cost and profit of 3D prints and laser cuts
posts.description: FabLog is the first iOS app built specifically for makers who 3D print and laser cut. It tracks every session, material usage, electricity costs, taxes, time and more, so you know exactly what each project costs to produce and track your earnings. Born from a personal need: I'm a maker who got tired of guessing how much each print was actually costing me. No analytics, no tracking, no data collected. Just a simple, private tool built by a maker, for makers. Available in English and Italian.

posts.name: Helm
posts.tagline: Job-hunt copilot, built so the work stays yours
posts.description: Helm is for job hunters who refuse to spam. Most "AI job-hunt" tools auto-apply for you, generic resumes blasted to hundreds of jobs while you sleep. Recruiters hate them, candidates get burned out, and nothing actually improves. Helm is the opposite: a copilot that helps you find right-fit roles, score them against your background, tailor your resume per job, and track the lifecycle. The submit button is always yours.

posts.name: Aurum
posts.tagline: Personal finance tracking without linking your bank account
posts.description: Aurum is a personal finance tracker for people who want clarity without connecting their bank account. Track income, expenses, savings rate, net worth, debt payoff, financial runway, and a 30-day projected balance, all from manual entry. No bank connections. No Plaid. No data selling. Just a clean dashboard with the full picture. Free to start, Pro at $9/month.

posts.name: Phosphor
posts.tagline: Real-time visuals that move with the music
posts.description: Real-time music visualizer for macOS. Reacts to any audio - Spotify, Apple Music, a brower tab, your DAW. Float it, throw it fullscreen, run it as a live wallpaper behind your work, or shrink it to a cyan EQ in your menu bar.

posts.name: AiQ: Learn AI Prompting
posts.tagline: Duolingo for AI prompting. AI teaching you to be good at AI.
posts.description: Most people use AI like a search engine and wonder why the results are mediocre. The fix is prompting, and nobody's teaching it properly. AiQ teaches you through real practice. Each lesson: see a bad prompt vs. a good one, then write your own. Real AI grades your submission and shows your prompt rewritten with improvements highlighted. 50+ lessons. Goes from basics to building with AI. Built 100% with Claude Code in 8 weeks.

posts.name: AI Birth Certificates
posts.tagline: Give your AI agent an official digital identity
posts.description: AI Birth Certificates lets creators register and certify their AI agents with a unique digital identity. Generate a professional AI birth certificate, establish authorship, showcase creation details, and become part of the growing AI agent ecosystem. Built for builders, founders, creators, and the future of autonomous AI.

posts.name: Susan by VantagePoint Networks
posts.tagline: Your client data. Never leaves
posts.description: Susan is AI-powered legal practice management software that runs 100% on your own servers. Your client data never touches our cloud — zero data risk, full compliance. Built for UK law firms: matter management, AI legal secretary, built-in email client, and a secure client portal. No SaaS subscriptions sending your confidential files offsite. From £35/user/month. Free trial available.

posts.name: Film Cue
posts.tagline: Three rounds to make a film. Three rounds to unmake theirs.
posts.description: Film Cue is a two-player card-drafting game about making movies. Pick one card, pass the rest. You won't see what they took until both picks are revealed. Eight scoring categories, eight rules. Each pick is a bet on what your opponent is building — and a denial of what they want. Play free in your browser, no sign-up. Share a link or face the CPU first. Three rounds to make a film. Three rounds to unmake theirs.

posts.name: DesignerFlow
posts.tagline: The Studio OS for interior design teams
posts.description: DesignerFlow is a Studio OS for interior design teams, built from real studio workflows. It brings projects, rooms, BOQs / FF&E items, suppliers, quote requests, renderings, documents, activity and client-safe updates into one workspace — replacing the scattered mix of Excel sheets, Drive folders, WhatsApp threads, emails, PDFs and disconnected files many studios still rely on.

posts.name: VMMS
posts.tagline: Complete voucher management system for government & company
posts.description: VMMS is a production-ready voucher management and monitoring system built with Laravel 12 + Vue 3. Designed for government offices, companies, and educational institutions. Three role panels — Admin, Staff, and Client. Multi-department workflow routing, real-time pipeline tracker, staff performance analytics, automated emails, audit trails, and full documentation. Try the live demo: https://vmms-app-production.up.railway.app/login

posts.name: BRANDTRAINER.AI
posts.tagline: Train your brand's AI. Scale your content.
posts.description: Brand Trainer AI trains custom AI models on your brand's voice, visuals and guidelines — then automates copywriting, image and video production at scale. Already used by SNCF, BNP Paribas and Mackage.

posts.name: Synli.ai
posts.tagline: WCAG scanning that drafts your accessibility report
posts.description: Synli drafts a complete WCAG accessibility assessment for every criterion except one — combining automated scanning with AI-assisted analysis. Instead of a raw issue list, you get a structured draft report to review and sign off. For Norwegian public-sector teams, it maps directly to the uustatus.no accessibility statement workflow. Supports authenticated scanning including OAuth, 2FA, and SSO. Hosted in Europe.

posts.name: Optimatio.io
posts.tagline: All-in-one SEO platform for agencies
posts.description: Optimatio.io is an all-in-one SEO workspace for agencies. Build month-by-month SEO roadmaps, generate client-ready keyword research in minutes, map keywords to pages, track city-level rankings and monitor AI visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Copilot and Grok.

posts.name: Isotrax
posts.tagline: Free TMS for small hauliers
posts.description: Small and mid-sized hauliers have always been priced out of proper transport management software — tools that only the big players could afford. Isotrax changes that. Full TMS with order management, route optimization, pricing, invoicing, a driver mobile app, and a customer & carrier portal. Free to start, no time limit. Upgrade when you're ready. Built in Sweden. Designed for the world.

posts.name: VidNest
posts.tagline: Manage and Clean your Youtube watchlist
posts.description: YouTube Watch Later is a mess. VidNest bulk-cleans your videos and removes the 5,000 limit. Save unlimited, organize with folders, find instantly.

posts.name: Flowna
posts.tagline: Turn irregular income into a calm daily spending number
posts.description: Flowna turns unpredictable income into one calm number you can spend today without breaking your week. Log by voice, photo, SMS, or tap. Built for hustlers in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana & South Africa.

posts.name: Precog
posts.tagline: An AI portrait of who you become, every Sunday at 7 PM
posts.description: Precog draws an AI portrait of your future self at 1, 5, and 10 years out — built from your sleep, exercise, and water logs. Sunday at 7 PM, every week. iPhone, iOS 26+.

posts.tagline: Find the right helpdesk software without vendor bias
posts.description: HelpDeskPicker helps teams choose the right helpdesk software without vendor bias, endless demos, or generic "Top 10" lists. Compare 70+ platforms side by side, filter by AI features, integrations, pricing, workflows, and team size, and discover which tools actually fit your tech stack. Built from real-world experience with helpdesk platforms and data migrations to make software research faster, simpler, and more practical.

posts.name: Debut Infotech
posts.tagline: Custom software engineering for startups and enterprises
posts.description: Debut Infotech helps startups and enterprises build scalable AI, blockchain, Web3, and custom software solutions. Since 2011, our team has delivered 500+ digital products across fintech, healthcare, logistics, gaming, and enterprise automation. From AI-powered apps to crypto exchange development, we turn complex ideas into reliable software products with end-to-end development support.

posts.name: LifePilot by Innovobit
posts.tagline: Smart Life Organizer, Team Scheduler & Smart Calendar
posts.description: Most calendar apps just record. LifePilot thinks ahead free for iOS & Android. Pick a contact auto-fills title, location & next free time slot. One tap. Done. See your team's availability inside your own calendar. No Doodle. No messages. World holidays for every country & Greek Namedays built in. Insights & statistics to understand where your time goes. Notes, Shopping List, Private mode everything in one place. Your data stays on your device, not on ours. No ads. No subscription. Ever.

posts.name: On This Day
posts.tagline: The history quiz that drops you inside the moment
posts.description: History games usually feel like exams. On This Day feels like being there. Each day you get 10 scenes richly written, present-tense. You're placed inside a moment 10 seconds before a pivotal event in history. Then you're asked: what happens next? Four choices. One correct answer. What makes it different: - The writing is cinematic, not dry. Each scene is crafted to make you feel the tension. - It's daily and free. 10 new moments every day. Built solo, vibe-coded on Replit.

posts.name: Trakup
posts.tagline: The all-in-one website audit & monitoring platform
posts.description: TrakUp is the all-in-one website audit & monitoring platform. Get automated reports on Lighthouse scores, Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, security, DNS, brand presence (Open Graph, favicon, structured data), and carbon footprint. Crawl every page, monitor uptime every 10 minutes, track trends over time. Connect Google Search Console, get alerts on Slack/Discord, deliver white-label PDF reports. REST API included. Free plan available.

posts.name: VoiceScale
posts.tagline: Tailored LinkedIn posts for every employee in their voice
posts.description: Most employee advocacy tools make sharing easier. VoiceScale makes the content itself better. Upload one piece of company content and VoiceScale generates tailored LinkedIn posts for every employee, matched to their role, seniority, and voice. Sarah in Sales gets a customer angle. The CMO gets a thought leadership take. No one writes a word. Enterprise marketing teams finally have a way to scale authentic employee advocacy without burning anyone out.

posts.name: Colorado AI Act Readiness Toolkit
posts.tagline: Six-module compliance toolkit for Colorado AI Act readiness.
posts.description: Colorado AI Act Readiness Toolkit helps HR, legal, compliance, privacy, and AI governance teams prepare for SB 24-205 before the 30 June 2026 deadline. Includes six practical modules: AI scoping, inventory, developer/deployer assessment, NIST AI RMF-aligned risk policy, impact assessment, consumer notices, developer disclosures, AG disclosure workflow, glossary, and affirmative-defence checklist.

posts.name: Stowe
posts.tagline: Track HSA receipts locally
posts.description: Stowe is a free desktop app for people who pay medical expenses out-of-pocket and want to reimburse themselves from their HSA years later — legally and with a clean paper trail. The IRS allows this strategy (called "deferred reimbursement"), but it requires you to keep every receipt for every expense, indefinitely. Stowe makes that manageable. Stowe stores everything locally — receipts folder on your own machine. No account required, no files sent to a server, no subscription.

posts.name: DocuPull 2.0
posts.tagline: Automate title search, QC, and report generation
posts.description: DocuPull automates title search, extraction, and title report generation for title companies and mortgage teams. Upload documents, and our system extracts deed/mortgage data, validates chain of title, and prepares structured title reports ready for QC and downstream use. Built for speed, accuracy, and scalability—already used by active title teams processing real orders in production.

posts.name: FilingFirehose
posts.tagline: SEC EDGAR filings API that catches buried disclosures
posts.description: FilingFirehose parses the body text of every 8-K, 13D, and S-3 filing in real time. We flag misclassified material events — 7.3% of 8-Ks have buried events the filer didn't report. REST + MCP + ChatGPT GPT.

posts.name: Sunbreak
posts.tagline: Sleep better tonight
posts.description: Built for people who've tried everything else. No “Ignore Limit” button. No negotiations with yourself at 1 AM. App Blocking Choose which apps to block at bedtime. They stay locked until sunrise. No bypass. Phone Down Mode Your phone sounds an alarm if you pick it up during bedtime. Put it down and it stops. Accountability Partners Add friends who get emailed if you break your sleep pact. Real consequences.

posts.name: AgenTank
posts.tagline: Your AI agent pilots a tank in battle
posts.description: An AI tank battle game where you don’t drive the tank yourself. Your AI agent pilots the tank in battle, makes decisions, and exposes its strengths and weaknesses under pressure. After each fight, you watch what happened, give the agent strategic feedback, and let it update the tank’s code before sending it back into battle. It’s a game about observing, coaching, iterating, and watching your agent become smarter one battle at a time.

posts.name: Voynex
posts.tagline: No language barriers. Just conversations.
posts.description: Voynex is real-time voice translation made for real conversations. Hold to speak in your language, hear the translation in theirs. Conversation Mode flips the screen for the other person. 18 languages with more coming. What's different: - Hold-to-talk (no fiddly buttons mid-conversation) - AI voices that don't sound robotic - 9 UI languages, Voynex speaks yours - Free tier, 60 credits/month, no signup Built solo over 6 months. iOS only for now.

The conversations that produced your code now live next to your code, version with your code, and stay on your machine - readable with jq, redacted for secrets by default, in an open format (PLF) any tool can read or write. MIT-licensed.

posts.name: AskPics
posts.tagline: Organize and search your screenshots with AI
posts.description: Most tools help you search files, notes, or documents. But, almost none are built for one of the most common (and messy) things we all collect: screenshots. AskPics is designed specifically for this. Using AI, it understands the content and context inside your screenshots, turning them into a searchable, interactive knowledge base you can actually use. There’s no setup, no folders, and no manual organization. Just import your screenshots and start asking questions and get instant answers!

It’s a game about observing, coaching, iterating, and watching your agent become smarter one battle at a time.

posts.name: On This Day
posts.tagline: The history quiz that drops you inside the moment

What makes it different: - The writing is cinematic, not dry. Each scene is crafted to make you feel the tension. - It's daily and free. 10 new moments every day. Built solo, vibe-coded on Replit.

posts.name: Stowe
posts.tagline: Track HSA receipts locally
posts.description: Stowe is a free desktop app for people who pay medical expenses out-of-pocket and want to reimburse themselves from their HSA years later — legally and with a clean paper trail. The IRS allows this strategy (called "deferred reimbursement"), but it requires you to keep every receipt for every expense, indefinitely. Stowe makes that manageable. Stowe stores everything locally — receipts folder on your own machine. No account required, no files sent to a server, no subscription.

posts.name: StudioMI300
posts.tagline: Open-source text-to-cinematic-reel on a single AMD MI300X
posts.description: One sentence becomes a 30-second cinematic reel with characters, story, music, and voice-over — end-to-end on a single AMD Instinct MI300X. 8 stages, sequential: Qwen3.5-35B Director plans 6 shots, FLUX.2 paints character keyframes (no LoRA training), Wan2.2 animates, vision critic auto-retries bad clips, ACE-Step adds music, Kokoro narrates in 9 languages, ffmpeg mixes. Every model Apache 2.0 / MIT. Outputs commercially usable. Single MI300X end-to-end thanks to 192GB HBM3.

posts.description: I've created a website that uses my open-source Python package that automatically solves LinkedIn games by extracting solutions from network requests. It displays it on the site and displays all the solutions. It's been running for over a year, so feel free to take a look. Solves all LinkedIn daily games: - Pinpoint - CrossClimb - Queens - Zip - Tango - Mini Sudoku Headless operation (no browser window required), saves solutions to JSON files, simple API for integration into other projects.

posts.name: Numerati
posts.tagline: A daily puzzle game where today's date is the answer
posts.description: Every day, the 8 digits of today's date (MM/DD/YYYY) are scrambled across a tile board. Your job: restore them to the correct order. Tiles don't just swap. A tile can blast its neighbor across the board, traveling a distance equal to its own value. Finding the optimal solution in the fewest moves possible is the challenge. One puzzle per day. Everyone plays the same one. Your days are numbered.

posts.tagline: Engineering drawings → mm-accurate, editable 3D CAD
posts.description: Drawing Agent turns industrial 2D drawings into millimetre-accurate, editable 3D CAD — not "looks-like-the-thing" meshes. It writes CadQuery code, renders the 3D from multiple angles, has an AI evaluator compare every view to your drawing, and rewrites the code until the dimensions converge. The output is a B-Rep solid (STEP / STL / GLB) that opens in SolidWorks, Fusion, or Inventor with every edge sized to spec, plus the Python source for audit.

posts.name: ImpactGuard
posts.tagline: Detect the blast radius of API changes before you merge
posts.description: ImpactGuard is a software that analyzes changes to APIs in various programming languages (Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Kotlin, C, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Swift, Ruby, Haskell, and Zig). It also calculates the risk of breaking existing code before merging, using a Severity × Exposure × Confidence (S×E×C) score. It integrates with CI/CD (Git hooks and GitHub workflows). It automatically blocks high-risk changes, it can suggest patches.

posts.name: AI Tutorium

Learning paths, a benchmarked prompt library, and frameworks like the Five Stages of AI Adoption and the ICE Method — built for professionals who are past the basics and want to do something that actually matters with AI.

posts.name: VLC Media Player 3.0.23
posts.tagline: VLC Media Player 3.0.23
posts.description: VLC Media Player 3.0.23 is a free, open-source, cross-platform media player. It plays almost any file format (MP4, MKV, MP3, etc.) without needing extra codecs. Features include hardware decoding for 4K/8K, streaming to Chromecast, native Windows ARM64 support, and an official dark mode. No ads, no spyware.

posts.name: Dayprint - Screen Time Audit
posts.tagline: Private screen time audit for Android
posts.description: Dayprint is a privacy-first screen time audit app for Android. Instead of blocking apps, it helps you understand where your phone time goes: app usage reports, focus leaks, bedtime scrolling, pickup patterns, and digital rhythm insights. Everything is processed on-device, with no account, no cloud upload, and no personal usage data leaving your phone.

posts.description: Bij Nesheli kun je eenvoudig t-shirts laten bedrukken, kleding bedrukken en bedrijfskleding personaliseren met jouw eigen ontwerp of logo. Wij bieden hoogwaardige prints, snelle levering en betaalbare prijzen voor zowel bedrijven als particulieren. Of je nu goedkope t-shirts wilt bedrukken of een professioneel logo op een t-shirt wilt drukken, Nesheli zorgt voor kwaliteit, comfort en een perfecte uitstraling voor elke gelegenheid.

posts.name: Find-a-Jew
posts.tagline: Expose the celebrities for being jews or supporting Israel.
posts.description: An AI app that tells if the person is connected to Israel, zionists, jews or Epstein. It might be a famous person, well known celebrity or just a historical figure. It does a deep research and finds things that you would spend hours to research on your own.

posts.name: MindMilker
posts.tagline: Stress-Test Your thinking, Be innovative

posts.name: Bloom Vocal
posts.tagline: The AI vocal coach that tells you what you're doing wrong
posts.description: Most vocal apps give you a score. Bloom Vocal tells you why your voice cracked on that note — and what to fix. After a few sessions, the AI figures out your vocal pattern. are you chest-pulling? locking your larynx? flipping when you shouldn't? and routes you to the exercises that actually address your problem. It's like having a teacher who's heard thousands of voices and still focuses entirely on yours.

posts.name: Helqora
posts.tagline: Privacy-first artwork validator powered by C++ & WebAssembly
posts.description: Helqora is a "local-first" validator. While most tools force users to upload sensitive artwork to a server, we process everything entirely in the browser via a C++/WASM engine. 1. Privacy: Zero uploads. Your artwork never leaves your device. 2. Performance: Native C++ speed for instant analysis of DPI, bleed, and color profiles. 3.Depth: 70+(Not all is on the web) built-in presets specifically for POD sellers (Etsy, Printful, etc.) that generic checkers miss.
